reasoning: This workout addresses your primary lactate clearance limiter by targeting over-under intervals. Your last ride was a steady effort, and now we're focusing on developing your fatigue resistance and aerobic base. This will directly help with maintaining target power on the prolonged climbs of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6x(5 min @ 242-256W, 3 min @ 201-218W) to work on over-unders. Focus on clearing and sustaining lactate efficiently.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
